docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAURO, CAROL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REESINK, MICHAEL $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $94.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $494.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT PROVIDE TIMELY NOTICE CONCERNING THE DISPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT REESINK, MICHAEL
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM PLAINTIFF RECEIVED AND FILED FOR THE JUDGE TO READ.
PLAINTIFF'S AUTHORIZATION LETTER ALLOWING SHARON PITTMAN TO PICK UP EXHIBITS FILED. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETURNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY MAURO, CAROL AS TO DEFENDANT REESINK, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT REESINK, MICHAEL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-03-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-03-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED BY THE COURT TO 5/3/06 AT 3:30 P.M. FOR TRIAL.
